summary: Agents can list, search, and resolve Linear project and initiative names through first-class commands and attach projects to issues without treating names as UUIDs.
reason: Human issue-routing requests often ask for project or initiative inventories and then name portfolio objects in prose; passing those names through UUID fields produced invalid issueUpdate previews and unsafe mutation inputs.
validated_outcome: Added tests for project and initiative list/search/resolve, exact-name enforcement, write team-boundary rejection, not-found and ambiguous errors, issue create/edit project-name dry-run and mutation resolution, mutual-exclusion, and non-UUID --project rejection.
